确定删除 ${cleanupRetentionDays} 天前已完成的 Tele:
Delete completed Telegram download task history older than ${cleanupRetentionDays} days?

This only deletes task audit details. File indexes and cloud files will not be deleted.
删除下载任务历史失败: Failed to delete download task history
更新 Telegram 允许用户列表失败: Failed to update Telegram allowed users
确定要把系统默认存储切换到 ${providerName}${accountId:
Switch the system default storage to ${providerName}${accountId ? ' (specified account)' : ''}?

This affects all newly submitted tasks for every user. Existing upload, Telegram, and yt-dlp tasks will continue using their original destination. A read-only connection test will run before switching.
请填写 Client ID 和 Client Secret: Enter the Client ID and Client Secret
授权窗口被浏览器拦截，请允许弹窗后重试: The authorization window was blocked. Allow pop-ups and try again.
Google Drive 授权成功并已启用！: Google Drive authorized and enabled successfully!
确定要删除账户 “${accountName}” 吗？\n\n将删除该账户在 T:
Delete account “${accountName}”?

This will delete the account's file index records from TG Vault, but not the original cloud files.
阿里云 OSS 账户添加成功！: Alibaba Cloud OSS account added successfully!
添加阿里云 OSS 账户失败:: Failed to add Alibaba Cloud OSS account:
添加 S3 兼容存储账户失败:: Failed to add S3-compatible storage account:
请填写账户名称和 URL: Enter the account name and URL
添加 WebDAV 存储账户失败:: Failed to add WebDAV storage account:
为了安全，请确认您的管理员密码以禁用 2FA：: For security, enter your administrator password to disable 2FA:
新密码至少需要 8 位: The new password must be at least 8 characters
两次输入的新密码不一致: The new passwords do not match
确定退出所有设备吗？当前浏览器也需要重新登录。: Sign out of all devices? You will also need to sign in again in this browser.
退出所有设备失败: Failed to sign out of all devices
修改成功后会撤销全部 Web 会话，所有设备都需要使用新密码重新登录。: After the password is changed, all web sessions will be revoked and every device must sign in again with the new password.
修改并退出全部设备: Change and sign out all devices
立即撤销当前浏览器的登录会话。: Immediately revoke the current browser session.
撤销当前密码下签发的全部 Web 会话。: Revoke all web sessions issued under the current password.
启用 TOTP 二次验证以保护您的账户安全。支持 Google Authenti: Protect your account with TOTP two-factor authentication. Supports Google Authenticator, Authy, and similar apps.
使用您的 2FA App（如 Google Authenticator）扫描此二: Scan this QR code with your 2FA app, such as Google Authenticator.
输入 App 生成的 6 位验证码以确认设置。: Enter the 6-digit code generated by the app to confirm setup.
您的账户已受到 2FA 保护。登录时将要求输入验证码。: Your account is protected by 2FA. A verification code will be required when signing in.
删除旧的 Telegram 下载审计明细，降低大型下载任务长期占用；不会删除文件: Delete old Telegram download audit records to reduce long-term storage use by large download tasks. File indexes and cloud files will not be deleted.
允许使用 Bot 的 Telegram 用户: Telegram users allowed to use the bot
输入允许通过 Telegram Bot PIN 登录的 user id，多个用英: Enter the user IDs allowed to sign in using the Telegram Bot PIN. Separate multiple IDs with commas, spaces, or line breaks. An empty list rejects all users. If no user has authenticated yet, the first user to enter the correct PIN will be added automatically.
获取 user id：让用户在 Telegram 私聊 @userinfobot: To get a user ID, ask the user to message @userinfobot privately on Telegram and check the ID.
TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_USER_IDS is currently set on the backend. Update .env and restart the backend.
开启后，文件下载优先走已登录的 Telegram 用户账号 session: When enabled, file downloads use the signed-in Telegram user account session first.
更新 Telegram 下载设置失败: Failed to update Telegram download settings
这项功能需要你先准备用户账号 session: This feature requires a prepared user account session
1. 申请 Telegram 的 api_id 和 api_hash: 1. Obtain an api_id and api_hash from Telegram
2. 运行 npm run login:telegram-user 生成 ses: 2. Run npm run login:telegram-user to generate the session file
3. 在后端环境变量里填写 TELEGRAM_API_ID、TELEGRAM_A: 3. Set TELEGRAM_API_ID, TELEGRAM_API_HASH, and TELEGRAM_USER_SESSION_FILE in the backend environment
提示：启用后，只有已登录的用户账号 session 会参与下载；如果 sessi: Note: Once enabled, downloads only use a signed-in user account session. If the session is not ready, the download will fail and stop instead of silently falling back to the previous behavior.
首次配置？请参阅: First time setting this up? See
文件存储在服务器本地磁盘。适合常规使用，速度最快。: Files are stored on the server's local disk. Best for general use and offers the fastest performance.
管理及切换多个 Google Drive 账户: Manage and switch between multiple Google Drive accounts
前往 Google Cloud Console 创建 OAuth 2.0 客户端: Go to Google Cloud Console and create an OAuth 2.0 client ID.
应用类型选择 Web 应用程序，并添加以下已授权的重定向 URI：: Select Web application as the application type and add the following authorized redirect URI:
共享云端硬盘 ID / 团队盘 ID（可选）: Shared drive ID / Team drive ID (optional)
留空则使用“我的云端硬盘”。如需上传到共享云端硬盘，请填写 URL 中 fold: Leave blank to use “My Drive.” To upload to a shared drive, enter the shared drive ID that appears after folders/ in its URL. The authorized account must be a member of the shared drive and have permission to create files.
点击按钮前往 Google 页面完成授权。: Click the button to complete authorization on Google.
管理及切换多个 OneDrive 账户: Manage and switch between multiple OneDrive accounts
前往 Microsoft Entra ID 控制台 并登录。授权账号可与最终存储: Go to the Microsoft Entra ID portal and sign in. The authorizing account may differ from the final storage account.
注册应用时，重定向 URI 请选择 Web，并填写：: When registering the application, select Web for the redirect URI and enter:
如果填写客户端密码，请复制 Azure「证书和密码」里新建密码后的值 Value: If you provide a client secret, copy the Value shown after creating it under Azure “Certificates & secrets.” Do not copy the “Secret ID.” Copying the wrong field causes Microsoft to return AADSTS7000215 Invalid client secret.
自定义显示名称，例如：个人网盘: Custom display name, for example: Personal Drive
公共客户端模式可不填: Leave blank for public client mode
点击下方按钮前往微软页面完成授权，系统将自动识别并添加该账户。: Click the button below to complete authorization on Microsoft. The account will be detected and added automatically.
管理及切换多个阿里云 OSS 存储源: Manage and switch between multiple Alibaba Cloud OSS storage providers
尚未配置 Aliyun OSS 账户: No Alibaba Cloud OSS accounts configured
请提供您的阿里云 OSS 访问凭证。建议使用具有最小权限的 RAM 用户。: Provide your Alibaba Cloud OSS access credentials. A RAM user with minimum required permissions is recommended.
保存后系统将尝试连接此 OSS 账户。: The system will test the connection to this OSS account after saving.
管理及切换多个 S3 (MinIO, Cloudflare R2, AWS S3: Manage and switch between multiple S3 storage providers, including MinIO, Cloudflare R2, and AWS S3
支持 MinIO, Cloudflare R2, AWS S3 等。请确保已开启: Supports MinIO, Cloudflare R2, AWS S3, and other providers. Make sure cross-origin access (CORS) is enabled.
强制路径风格 (Force Path Style) - MinIO 或私有化部署: Force path style — recommended for MinIO or self-hosted deployments
保存后系统将尝试连接此 S3 账户。: The system will test the connection to this S3 account after saving.
管理及切换多个 WebDAV (坚果云, InfiniCLOUD, Synolo: Manage and switch between multiple WebDAV storage providers, including Nutstore, InfiniCLOUD, and Synology
请提供您的 WebDAV 服务器地址及登录凭证。: Provide your WebDAV server address and sign-in credentials.
保存后系统将尝试连接此 WebDAV 账户。: The system will test the connection to this WebDAV account after saving.
查看 Web、Telegram、频道订阅和 yt-dlp 的统一执行状态。: View unified execution status for Web, Telegram, channel subscriptions, and yt-dlp.
调整来源或状态筛选后再查看。: Adjust the source or status filters and try again.
